subcodes.first_line: This is a Tablet which God hath, in truth, sent down at this time and made it a proof unto all the worlds, and verily it is in itself a perspicuous Book [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا لوح قد انزله الله حینئذ بالحق و جعله حجه للعالمین و انه بنفسه لکتاب مبین
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation, @idle fancies; lust and passion, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity
